backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a student experience-sharing platform, with data types and CRUD operations for posts, wishlists, and college connect tips, plus stats aggregation and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (brand rename, share buttons, non-blocking year modal, translation updates) to their affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title set to 'Memu Nerchukunnam | మేము నేర్చుకున్నాం', a custom favicon, and Open Graph meta tags for social sharing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with six routes (home, share, post detail, dashboard, about, wishlist) wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, with no blocking year-selection modal.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectFo: Form component for submitting a college connect tip with fields for college name, year, and tip text, including validation, error display, and a success toast using warm OKLCH palette styling.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectLi: Renders a scrollable list of college connect tips fetched via a query hook, displaying each tip with college name, year badge (color-coded), relative timestamp, and skeleton loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header containing the brand logo, desktop/mobile navigation links, a mute/unmute sound toggle, and renders SparkParticles as a background effect.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a single post as a clickable card with category badge, year badge, bookmark toggle (wishlist), and formatted relative timestamp, linking to the post detail route.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Renders share action buttons (WhatsApp, copy link, native share) for a specific post, constructing a share URL and text from the post ID and content.
frontend/src/components/ShareWebsiteButt: Renders a styled card with WhatsApp, copy link, and native share buttons for sharing the overall website URL, with copy confirmation feedback.
frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.t: Renders 16 animated floating pill-shaped particles across a fixed background layer using a stratified grid layout, each labeled with a college year and styled with warm colors.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: A modal component that prompts users to select their college year (1st–4th) and optionally enter their college name, storing the selection via the useYearSelection hook.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for toggling between English and Telugu languages, persisting the selection in sessionStorage and exposing a translation helper function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching posts, stats, wishlist management, and college connect operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Manages per-session wishlist state using a UUID session key stored in sessionStorage, providing a toggle function to add or remove posts from the wishlist.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: A hook that reads and writes the user's selected college year and college name to sessionStorage, dispatching a custom event on year selection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a warm brown/skin-tone CSS custom property palette for light and dark modes, Tailwind imports, font imports, and utility animations like dot-grid background and spark-float keyframes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page with a hero banner, mission statement, share buttons, and a feature grid highlighting key platform attributes like open access and decentralized storage.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Displays a stats dashboard with total post counts by category, a top-upvoted posts section, and a College Connect panel with form and list components.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main feed page with a hero banner, category filter tabs, optional year-personalization banner/modal, share buttons, and a list of posts fetched by category or all.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Shows the full detail view of a single post identified by URL param, including category badge, author year, bookmark toggle, share buttons, and loading/not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: Provides a form for submitting a new experience post with category selection, character-limited textarea, year modal prompt, and a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: Displays the user's bookmarked posts by cross-referencing wishlist IDs from the session with all posts, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state with a browse link.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for the entire app, covering navigation, UI labels, page content, and category helpers under a `translations` object keyed by language code.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides Web Audio API utilities for mute state management and two sound effects: a bubble-pop tone (for upvotes/submits) and a typing tick noise (for textarea keydowns).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, border radii, and spark-float keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including completed features, pending architectural requests, known issues, and metadata for the 'Memu Nerchukunnam' college community platform.
